name: HaGeZi Anti-Piracy

name: HaGeZi DoH/VPN/TOR/Proxy Bypass

name: HaGeZi Multi NORMAL

name: HaGeZi Multi PRO

name: HaGeZi Multi PRO Mini

name: HaGeZi Multi PRO++

name: HaGeZi Multi PRO++ Mini

name: HaGeZi Multi ULTIMATE
description_es: La lista mas agresiva de HaGeZi multi. Solo si estas dispuesto a mantener una allowlist.

name: HaGeZi Multi ULTIMATE Mini

name: HaGeZi Native Tracker

name: HaGeZi NSFW
